content:
🌟 project_aura | C
🎯 Primary Use Case: To build a DIY, ESP32-S3 powered air quality monitoring station with a graphical user interface and smart home integration.
✨ Key Features: • Professional telemetry: PM0.5/PM1/PM2.5/PM4/PM10, CO, CO2, VOC, NOx, temperature, humidity, absolute humidity (AH), pressure, HCHO. • No soldering required: designed for easy assembly using Grove/QT connectors.
📖 Summary: Project Aura AQ is an open-source ESP32-S3 based air quality station featuring a touch-friendly LVGL UI, local web setup, and MQTT integration for Home Assistant. It provides comprehensive air quality telemetry and is designed for easy assembly by makers.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
